Intimate Wellness

M-Shot Treatment in Kampala

The Priapus Shot (M-Shot) uses your own platelet-rich plasma to improve sexual performance, sensitivity, and confidence — completely naturally.

Premium M-Shot

What is
the M-Shot?

M-shot is a medical procedure that involves the injection of platelet-rich plasma (PRP) into specific areas of the penis. The goal of the M-shot is to potentially improve sexual function and treat certain conditions related to male sexual health.

The Process

1

1. Assessment of need and reason behind the symptoms.

2

2. Drawing of a small amount of blood to centrifuge and separate the Plasma Rich Proteins (PRP's).

3

3. Simple, minimally invasive injections of PRP's.

4

4. Enjoy improved sexual function and increased girth and sensation.

Target Areas

Conditions Treated

This treatment is remarkably versatile. Explore how this non-invasive technique addresses diverse aesthetic concerns to restore balance and harmony.

Erectile Dysfunction (ED)

Improves blood flow and stimulates the growth of new blood vessels, resulting in stronger, firmer, and more sustainable erections.

Decreased Sensitivity

Regenerates nerve tissue to heighten sensitivity and increase overall sexual pleasure and satisfaction.

Performance Anxiety

By enhancing physical performance and function, the M-Shot can significantly boost sexual confidence and reduce anxiety.

Peyronie's Disease

Helps break down scar tissue and plaque, which can reduce penile curvature and associated pain or discomfort.

Overall Sexual Wellness

Promotes healthier tissue and optimal function for a revitalized sex life and improved intimate wellness.

Quality & Excellence

Why Opt for
Dr. Chirag?

Artistic Vision

A keen, masterful aesthetic eye ensuring beautifully harmonious and perfectly proportioned results.

Safety First

Uncompromising standards using only premium, high-quality, FDA-approved dermal fillers.

Vast Experience

A proven track record with thousands of successful treatments performed by our expert team.

Myths & Facts

The Myth

"Results from M Shot Treatment are permanent."

The Fact

The effects last gracefully between 6-18 months, varying beautifully per individual.

Answers

Frequently Asked Questions

Explore our comprehensive FAQ section for quick answers to common queries about M Shot Treatment. Find the clarity you need without delay.

1. How long do the results of the M-Shot last?

With proper aftercare, results can last several months, with periodic treatments recommended.

2. Is there any downtime post-treatment?

Minimal to no downtime; slight redness may appear but dissipates rapidly.

3. How often should I undergo the treatment?

Typically, sessions every 4-6 months are suggested, but individual needs may vary.

4. Is the procedure painful?

It's minimally invasive, and any discomfort is minimal. Topical numbing might be used.

5. Can I combine the M-Shot with other treatments?

Yes, consult with Dr. Kotecha for a tailored skincare regimen.

6. What is the cost of M Shot Treatment in Uganda?

The actual cost will totally depend on your diagnosis, the severity of your condition, the amount and length of time required and your ultimate goals. The first step will be a consultation to define the treatment plan and then a cost can be accurately shared.

aesthetic, dermatological & wellness care.

From advanced skin rejuvenation and hair restoration to medical weight loss and IV therapy — we blend world-class technology with the artistry of personalised care, across four locations in Kampala and Juba.
